name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages



(* --type invariants
TypeOK == 
  /\ participants \in [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}, vote |-> {"None", "Yes", "No"}]]
  /\ coordinator \in [state |-> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}, vote |-> {"None", "Yes", "No"}]
  /\ messages \in [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> {"None", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, vote |-> {"None", "Yes", "No"}]]]
*)

(* --initialization
Init == 
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "Init", vote |-> "None"]]
  /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Init", vote |-> "None"]
  /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "None", vote |-> "None"]]]
*)

(* --next-state relation
Next == 
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
     /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "None", vote |-> "None"]]]
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "Prepare", vote |-> "None"]]]
     /\ coordinator' = [state |-> "Prepared", vote |-> "None"]
     /\ participants' = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "Prepared", vote |-> "None"]]
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Prepared"
     /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "Prepare", vote |-> "None"]]]
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "VoteYes", vote |-> "Yes"]]]
     /\ coordinator' = [state |-> "Prepared", vote |-> "Yes"]
     /\ participants' = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "Prepared", vote |-> "Yes"]]
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Prepared"
     /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "Prepare", vote |-> "None"]]]
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "VoteNo", vote |-> "No"]]]
     /\ coordinator' = [state |-> "Prepared", vote |-> "No"]
     /\ participants' = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "Prepared", vote |-> "No"]]
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Prepared"
     /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "VoteYes", vote |-> "Yes"]]]
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "Commit", vote |-> "None"]]]
     /\ coordinator' = [state |-> "Committed", vote |-> "Yes"]
     /\ participants' = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "Committed", vote |-> "Yes"]]
  \/ /\ coordinator.state = "Prepared"
     /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "VoteNo", vote |-> "No"]]]
     /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> [msg |-> "Abort", vote |-> "None"]]]
     /\ coordinator' = [state |-> "Aborted", vote |-> "No"]
     /\ participants' = [i \in 1..N |-> [state |-> "Aborted", vote |-> "No"]]
*)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkHeldBy(i, j) == forks[i] = j

PhilosopherThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Actions *)
TakeFork(i, j) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![j] = i]
PutFork(i, j) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![j] = 0]
Think(i) == states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
Hungry(i) == states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
Eat(i) == states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Next action *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ PhilosopherThinking(i)
          /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
          /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
          /\ Think(i)
          /\ TakeFork(i, LEFT(i))
          /\ TakeFork(i, RIGHT(i))
       \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ PhilosopherHungry(i)
          /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
          /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
          /\ Eat(i)
       \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ PhilosopherEating(i)
          /\ PutFork(i, LEFT(i))
          /\ PutFork(i, RIGHT(i))
          /\ Think(i)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [j \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K) \* sequence of length <= K
       /\ head \in 1..K
       /\ tail \in 1..K
       /\ count \in 0..K
       /\ q = <<>>
       /\ head = 1
       /\ tail = 1
       /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1) \* placeholder value
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ q' = Tail(q)
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
